title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Communications

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Tata Communications
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Frontend Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
